Meeting Minutes

Published

March 2, 2026

Modified

April 13, 2026

Project Log & Minutes

This page serves as a comprehensive record of our team’s progress, decisions, and action items throughout the semester.

Meeting 1

  • Date: March 2, 2026
  • Time: 10:15 AM - 10:30 AM
  • Location: Virtual
  • Attendees: Yi Ning and Saanvi

Agenda

  1. Project kickoff

Discussion Points

  1. Brainstorm ideas while we wait for project topic to be released
  2. Get started with quarto and netlify

Action Items

Task Assigned To Status
Set up website Yi Ning Completed

Meeting 2

  • Date: March 13, 2026
  • Time: 8:32 PM – 9:00 PM
  • Location: Virtual
  • Attendees: Saanvi Madan, Yi Ning

Agenda

  1. Project topic selection

Discussion Points

  1. Discussed possible project topics
  2. Selected Mini-Challenge 1 of the VAST 2025 Challenge after evaluating scope and feasibility

Action Items

Task Assigned To Status
Work on project proposal (due March 18) Both Completed

Closing

The meeting was adjourned at 9:00 PM. The next meeting date is March 21, 2026.

Meeting 3

  • Date: March 21, 2026
  • Time: 8:00 PM – 8:59 PM
  • Location: Virtual
  • Attendees: Saanvi Madan, Yi Ning

Agenda

  1. Data cleaning and visualisation planning

Discussion Points

  1. Data cleaning methods (Pandas vs Tableau pivoting)
  2. Visualisation planning for tasks:
  • Task 1a: Time series (artist vs song influence)
  • Task 1b: Use edges: composerof, lyricistof, memberof
  • Task 1c: Treemap / hierarchy / Sankey diagram
  • Task 2a: Time series
  • Task 2b: Bipartite network graph
  • Task 2c: Time series + stacked bar chart

Action Items

Task Assigned To Status
Create visuals for Task 1 Yi Ning Completed
Create visuals for Task 2 Saanvi Completed

Closing

The meeting was adjourned at 8:59 PM. The next meeting date is March 29, 2026.

Meeting 4

  • Date: March 29, 2026
  • Time: 9:00 PM – 10:00 PM
  • Location: Virtual (Zoom)
  • Attendees: Saanvi Madan, Yi Ning

Agenda

  1. Review visuals for Tasks 1 & 2

Discussion Points

  1. Task 1a: Chose Sankey over dot chart
  2. Task 1b & 1c: No major issues
  3. Task 2a: Balanced clarity vs comprehensiveness
  4. Task 2b: Issues with Gephi → consult professor
  5. Task 2c: Finalised stacked bar chart

Action Items

Task Assigned To Status
Improve visuals Both Completed
Brainstorm Task 3 visuals Both Completed

Closing

The meeting was adjourned at 10:00 PM. The next meeting date is March 30, 2026.

Meeting 5

  • Date: March 30, 2026
  • Time: 2:00 PM
  • Location: In-person
  • Attendees: Saanvi Madan, Yi Ning

Agenda

  1. Task 3 planning

Discussion Points

  1. Defined popularity & influence metrics
  2. Explored possible visualisations
  3. Selected artists for Task 3a

Action Items

Task Assigned To Status
Create Task 3a visuals Both Completed

Closing

The meeting was adjourned at 2:00 PM. The next meeting date is April 1, 2026.

Meeting 6

  • Date: April 1, 2026
  • Time: 8:00 PM – 9:00 PM
  • Location: In-person
  • Attendees: Saanvi Madan, Yi Ning

Agenda

  1. Review Task 3 visuals

Discussion Points

  1. Selected final visual types (trend, radar, Sankey, Gephi)
  2. Discussed identifying rising artists
  3. Decided to consult professor

Action Items

Task Assigned To Status
Create Task 3b visuals Both Completed

Closing

The meeting was adjourned at 9:00 PM. The next meeting date is April 3, 2026.

Meeting 7

  • Date: April 3, 2026
  • Time: 9:00 AM – 10:00 AM
  • Location: Virtual
  • Attendees: Saanvi Madan, Yi Ning, Prof Kam Tin Seong

Agenda

  1. Feedback session

Discussion Points

  1. Reviewed visuals with professor
  2. Added interactivity suggestions
  3. Discussed evaluation metrics
  4. Guidance on Gephi visualisation

Action Items

Task Assigned To Status
Improve visuals based on feedback Both Completed
Continue Task 3b Both Completed
Send Gephi files Saanvi Completed

Closing

The meeting was adjourned at 10:00 AM. The next meeting date is April 5, 2026.

Meeting 8

  • Date: April 5, 2026
  • Time: 9:30 AM – 9:50 AM
  • Location: Virtual
  • Attendees: Saanvi Madan, Yi Ning

Agenda

  1. Finalise Task 3b and poster

Discussion Points

  1. Finalised Task 3b visuals
  2. Began poster work and divided sections

Action Items

Task Assigned To Status
Poster (Overview, Motivation, Task 1) Yi Ning Completed
Poster (Task 2, 3, Conclusion) Saanvi Completed

Closing

The meeting was adjourned at 9:50 AM. The next meeting date is April 8, 2026.

Meeting 9

  • Date: April 8, 2026
  • Time: 8:45 PM – 9:35 PM
  • Location: Virtual
  • Attendees: Saanvi Madan, Yi Ning

Agenda

  1. Poster finalisation

Discussion Points

  1. Edited and finalised poster
  2. Resized and submitted on eLearn

Action Items

Task Assigned To Status
Complete final deliverables Both Completed

Closing

The meeting was adjourned at 9:35 PM. The next meeting date is tentative.
